evidence.transformer: fallback gate selected no reliable neural switches; same-subset metrics equal Stage37, so Transformer learned no deployable dynamics lift
evidence.jepa: non-collapse but downstream failure AUROC lift is negative; representation adds noise rather than useful selector/failure signal
evidence.hybrid: JEPA auxiliary does not improve dynamics; hybrid remains below or equal to Stage37 under safety gate
evidence.without_fallback: unprotected endpoint dynamics is not competitive with strong causal/Stage37 floor and would risk easy degradation
evidence.objective: raw endpoint/FDE loss does not explicitly teach Stage37 switch/harm/gain mechanism
evidence.domain: UCY-only held-out means ETH/TrajNet external evidence remains blocked

gates.evidence: candidate rel-FDE, oracle/teacher margin, switch/gain/harm, t50/hard weighting

gates.gate: Gate3 at least three neural model classes tried
Gate5 neural_with_fallback beats Stage37 on all/t50/hard

evidence.ETH_UCY: not_run_blocker: available rows are train-only under frozen Stage37 split; rebuilding held-out test would invalidate frozen policy/test protocol
evidence.TrajNet: not_run_blocker: train/val rows exist but no frozen held-out test split; requires Stage40 split rebuild and retuning on val only
evidence.OpenTraj_mixed: not_run_blocker: mixed test currently UCY; non-UCY held-out requires new split
